patterns.name: Fake Bridge
patterns.short_goal: Player trusts a visible shortcut over a gap and dies when it fails.

expectation.teach: Platforms over gaps are solid and will hold.
expectation.betray: This platform fades on contact; only the pit below is real.

patterns.notes: Ensure pit is covered by DeathZone. Goal reachable via alternate route or after learning.

patterns.name: Double Bluff Path
patterns.short_goal: First run one path is safe; later runs that path becomes lethal.

expectation.teach: The path I used last time is still safe.
expectation.betray: From attempt 2, that path has a trap; only the other route is safe.

patterns.notes: AttemptTrigger.Check() must be called on level load. Two routes to goal required. Condition set to GreaterOrEqual 2 (trap active from attempt 2 onward).

patterns.name: Safe-Looking Kill
patterns.short_goal: A corridor or platform looks safe but sometimes kills.

expectation.teach: This path is safe or I made it last time.
expectation.betray: Activation Chance < 100 or fake platform; path is never fully trustworthy.

patterns.notes: Use TrapBase Activation Chance 50 for SpikeTrap or KillPlayer; or FakePlatform over DeathZone.

patterns.name: Delayed Death Platform
patterns.short_goal: Death occurs after a delay (platform disappears or collapses), not on first touch.

expectation.teach: I have time to cross or it will hold for one more step.
expectation.betray: Platform vanishes or collapses after a short delay; hesitation causes death.

patterns.notes: Set Delay or Time Before Break. Prefabs in Floor (10).

patterns.name: Attempt Gate
patterns.short_goal: Level layout changes by attempt; a blocked path opens (or closes) on later runs.

expectation.teach: This path is blocked or this path is open.
expectation.betray: From attempt N the blocked path opens or the open path closes.

patterns.notes: On Condition Met → FakeWall BecomeOpen() or BecomeGhost(), or MovingTrap/TriggeredMoveTrap Activate(). Condition set to GreaterOrEqual 2 (gate opens from attempt 2 onward).

patterns.name: Rhythm Corridor
patterns.short_goal: Player must time movement between periodic hazards.

expectation.betray: There is a safe window each cycle; wrong timing kills.

patterns.notes: Auto Move On, ping-pong; or ArrowTrap Auto Start + Loop + Cycle Interval.

patterns.name: One-Time Safe
patterns.short_goal: First time through is safe if player runs; second time trap is active or retriggers.

expectation.teach: This section is safe after first pass.
expectation.betray: Section is only safe for a short window; lingering or re-entering gets you killed.

patterns.notes: AreaTrigger → TrapSequencer StartSequence(); step Delay → Ambush or SpikeTrap Activate().

patterns.name: Betrayal Platform (Attempt)
patterns.short_goal: First run platform is solid; second run it is already used and fades on contact.

expectation.betray: From attempt 2 the platform betrays on contact; must skip or use different route.

patterns.notes: AttemptTrigger On Condition Met → FakePlatform Activate(). Platform over DeathZone.

patterns.name: Crusher Run
patterns.short_goal: Player must pass through a closing space before being squished.

expectation.teach: I have time or I can wait.
expectation.betray: Crusher cycle is fixed; only passing in the safe window works.

patterns.notes: Set Move Offset, Crush Layer, Auto Start On. Prefabs in Ceiling (6), Floor (10), Walls (7).

patterns.name: Pop-Up Surprise
patterns.short_goal: A previously safe spot becomes lethal when player passes a line or on a specific attempt.

expectation.betray: Spot is only safe when ambush is not triggered; from attempt N or after crossing line it is deadly.

patterns.notes: AreaTrigger or AttemptTrigger → Activate(). Set Pop Offset and Pop Speed. Floor/Ceiling/Wall variants. Condition set to GreaterOrEqual 2 (ambush active from attempt 2 onward).

patterns.name: Warning Then Drop
patterns.short_goal: Short warning then ceiling block drops; player who lingers dies.

expectation.betray: Ceiling is deadly after a fixed delay from entering; must clear the zone quickly.

patterns.notes: AreaTrigger → TrapSequencer StartSequence(); step Delay 1.0 → Ceiling AmbushTrap-Falling Activate().

patterns.name: Arrow Rhythm Gate
patterns.short_goal: Player must cross corridor between arrow bursts.

expectation.betray: Safe crossing only between bursts; rhythm must be read.

patterns.notes: Auto Start On, Loop On, Cycle Interval set. Rotate so projectiles cross path. FreeZone or Ceiling/Wall variants.
